productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Max Full Court 2 Black Shoes
description: Bag that hoop with this pair of nike Air Max Full Court 2 shoes. Designed for Basketball lovers, this shoe adds an urban flair to the classic sport shoe and ensures optimum performance.Upper Synthetic leather upper with synthetic nike swoosh overlay in the midfoot regionPerforations in the forefoot and midfoot region for enhanced breathabilityMeshed and padded tongue and collar for snug comfortPadded fabric lining for optimal performanceLacing system for a customised FitPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleEncapsulated Air-Sole unit for impact protection Full length pylon midsole for optimum cushioning and lightweight comfortOutsoleWaffle pattern lugs on the outsole for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves for easy movement of the forefootShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
